title: KOL Discovery Platform
description: A full-stack platform to discover and analyze Key Opinion Leaders (KOLs) for marketing teams. Built with Next.js frontend and Golang backend.
descriptionId: Platform full-stack untuk menemukan dan menganalisis KOL (Key Opinion Leaders) untuk tim marketing.

title: Ethereum Smart Contract Suite
description: A comprehensive suite of Ethereum smart contracts including ERC-20 tokens, NFT contracts, and DeFi protocols. Fully tested with Hardhat.
descriptionId: Kumpulan smart contract Ethereum termasuk token ERC-20, kontrak NFT, dan protokol DeFi.

title: Solana Staking Program
description: A high-performance staking program built on Solana blockchain using Rust. Supports delegated staking, rewards distribution, and governance.
descriptionId: Program staking berperforma tinggi di blockchain Solana menggunakan Rust.

title: GPT Data Pipeline
description: An AI-powered data pipeline that integrates GPT API for automated data processing, classification, and insights generation at scale.
descriptionId: Pipeline data bertenaga AI yang mengintegrasikan GPT API untuk pemrosesan data otomatis.

title: AI WhatsApp Chatbot
description: An intelligent WhatsApp chatbot powered by LLMs for automated customer support, lead generation, and business workflows.
descriptionId: Chatbot WhatsApp cerdas berbasis LLM untuk dukungan pelanggan otomatis.

title: Instagram Engagement Rate Analyzer
description: A data analytics tool that analyzes Instagram accounts' engagement rates, follower growth trends, and content performance metrics.
descriptionId: Alat analitik data untuk menganalisis tingkat engagement akun Instagram.

title: Government Web App
description: A government-scale web application built with Java and Zkoss framework, handling complex workflows and large-scale data management.
descriptionId: Aplikasi web skala pemerintah dengan Java dan Zkoss untuk pengelolaan data berskala besar.

title: Social Media Data Pipeline
description: A real-time social media data pipeline processing millions of data points daily using Kafka, Airflow, and Elasticsearch for analytics.
descriptionId: Pipeline data media sosial real-time yang memproses jutaan titik data harian.
